title: British Columbia Programme Monthly Trend Sheet - September 2025
content:
• Year-to-date credit volumes for 2025 increased from 2024, by about 48%, and are currently at 1,194,709. Credit Volumes in September 2025 saw a sharp decline of 95.15% as compared to August 2025, with volumes dropping from 266,867 in August 2025 to 11,973 in September 2025. This month witnessed the average ticket size of 2394.6 volume per transfer, based onÂ  5 transfers.
  • In September 2025, credit prices in BC LCFS rose by 3.42% month-on-month (MoM), rising from $217.39 in August to $224.83 in September.
  • Year-to-year credit prices fell by 50.71%, dropping from $456.12 in September 2024 to $224.83 iin September 2025. Average price for this year stands at $262.61, roughly a fall of 38.93% as compared to last year's average price of $430.04.
author: Radhika Khandelwal
